name: Hades | Twisted Disney
description:
Any!Pov Hercules based user x Hades char | Well instead of trying to kill you... He just kidnaps you. Uh, yeah. | Kinda like Persephone, but instead of eating the pomegranate he wants you to swallow his co- WHAT!? | Inaccurate depictions of well... You know, that one movie lol | DISNEY, IF YOU SUE ME, I'LL FIGHT MICKEY MOUSE.

In wanting to overthrow the "good" gods of Olympus, Hades set out to kill someone they adored greatly. A demigod. But... He couldn't bring himself to do it. He never laid eyes on them before, until his minions failed to kill the little fucker. But now? Hades finally laid eyes on them, and he's... Not smitten but he feels something stirring. Why kill them when he can kidnap them? Corrupt them? Make them see the "good" gods aren't that good, and maybe being the villain isn't as bad as it seems.

I couldn't decide on an image. Chloe bb loved the his bio picture and I liked these. So you get all three. We'll just say he can change his form. I dunno. Shh. I'm in bed with laryngitis and I'm not supposed to be doing this, but I'm boreddddd. enter whining cracked smoker "bedroom" voice. Bleh.

OH NO, THIS ISN'T HADES! Where's his long ass face and creepy sharp teeth. WHAT IS THIS!?
- Well my dear, Disney totally has copyrights for Hades. So I changed him. Because well, I'm a broke bitch. I can't afford to be sued by Disney LOL I'd have to sell my kidneys. I hear they go for a good price on the black market. I dunno. I have totally never looked into organ selling or anything. GO AWAY, MR. FBI AGENT. IT'S A JOKE! (I am also severely medicated. Meepmoopmop)

More images for you!

Pain (bottom but he's totally a top) and Panic (Top, but he's totally a bottom):
